title: More Potted Plants
description: adds the ability to pot plants that normally can't be potted.
body:
this is a vanilla-like mod that adds potting plants that can't normally be potted. if you think of a plant, it can probably be potted.
it also adds various features to new and existing potted plants!
- potted vine and vine-like plants can be hung from chains!
- potted cactuses, sugar cane, and bamboo can be stacked!
- potted crops can be stunted with shears!
- water plants use a unique bottle pot!

additionally, all* potted plants are designed and modelled without any new textures. this mod is completely* resource pack compatible!

*except the crop blocks cuz man those guys are silly.
 also apples because like. those are items not much I can do about that :P
 
pot to your heart's content! if it's ought to go in a pot it ought!

                            ^ heh flower pot source code reference
